name: What kind of payout can I get for work-related breathing problems?

mainEntity.name: What kind of payout can I get for work-related breathing problems?

acceptedAnswer.text: Medical, 2/3 wages, disability benefits; $20K-$100K+ typical, more via third-party.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Workers' comp covers medical bills, lost wages (60-70% usually), and disability; averages $20K-$100K+ depending on severity.**

Severe cases add permanent partial disability or retraining[3]. No pain/suffering in comp; third-party suits allow more[1][2].

- Factors: time off work, impairment rating, future care.
- Utah/Idaho caps apply.
- Settlements common post-medical evaluation.

Get impairment rating; lawyer maximizes value via negotiation. Values vary widely[1].

description: Medical, 2/3 wages, disability benefits; $20K-$100K+ typical, more via third-party.
